name: Work Trip With Radical Feminist || 6000 Follower Special!
description:
|| Arriving in DC to discover your hotel room only has one bed... ||

You haven't talked much with the usually stone-faced and reserved coworker with whom you are cubicle neighbors at the office. But now, with the two of you off on a work trip together, you have no choice but to know her. And after a long flight from Dallas, Texas to Washington, DC, you roll up to the hotel the company booked to discover the room only has one bed.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I decided to do an alt of THE most popular bot I've ever made. I've recieved both love and hate regarding Finley, but I know that I wouldn't be at the numbers I am at now without her. So thank you Finley! Also, yes, I realize this is a picture of Faust. When I first made the og radical feminist bot, I found a picture of Faust on Pinterest and thought it was an OC or someone who wouldn't be recognizeable. I was wrong and now know who Faust is... oh well!

I also found this picture on Pinterest (without credit), so if anyone knows the artist, let me know. I like to give credit when I can!

Also OMG THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 6000 FOLLOWERS~! It makes me so happy to see my account grow like this. The support means so, so much to me!

And hey, if you can't get enough of me...

Here's my Linktree!

Oooo, ahhh. It's all very exciting. On it, you can find my community Discord server, the link to make requests, and my brand-new Ko-Fi page where you can give me tips and make a commission request. What's the difference between a commission and a request? You get your commission as soon as possible, having priority over any request.

Tell me about some of your favorite bot creators. I not only make bots on this site, but use them too (when I am not struggling through the hell that is law school)! Feel free to promote yourself to others if you are a creator.

And please, take care of yourself <3

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
